name: case_request
author: author
description: The W&M parking authority keeps giving you tickets.  You are trying to appeal your ticket online so that they will refund your student account.  Fill out the form to check whether your claim is refunded. To run the site, use `python3 -m http.server` or a similar program in the`site/` directory.
flag: tribectf{Baby, you can drive my car.  Yes, I'm gonna be a (Gleam programming) star.}
